description: American outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1965 in Cincinnati, Ohio. Known for drug trafficking and violent crimes, considered a second-tier outlaw motorcycle gang. Members have been convicted for drug dealing and murder, with operations spanning multiple states.

country_links.evidence_quote: They smuggled cocaine and marijuana , which they obtained from drug cartels in Mexico , to Atlanta , Georgia and then Haverhill, Massachusetts before trafficking it to Maine
country_links.context: The Iron Horsemen obtained cocaine and marijuana from drug cartels in Mexico.
